allow: Bash(node -e "try { require\('puppeteer'\); console.log\('puppeteer ok'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('puppeteer error:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('puppeteer'\); p.launch\({ headless: true, args: ['--no-sandbox', '--disable-setuid-sandbox'] }\).then\(b => { console.log\('launch ok'\); return b.close\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.log\('launch error:', e.message\)\);")
